version.description: store-stamped, monotonic; every prior version is kept

behavior.description: redact-and-continue (default, mask spans + proceed) | hold-and-surface (strict, suspend the hop)

acknowledgeUnguardedEgress.description: default mode + empty guard slot: true ⇒ egress proceeds UNGUARDED (recorded as such); false ⇒ it HOLDS (never silently unguarded)
